title: Moai Totem
description: replace the texture and the sound of the totem playing.
body:
Moai Totem

Behold the Moai Totem: a pixelated relic of the ancient. Drop it, worship it, vibe with it. Every pixel placed is a tribute to the eternal stone-faced emoji that watched over your chaotic group chats and cursed comment sections 🗿

![showcase of the totem popping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/428yxQMp/images/c88142a15f15fc24275862fde5c9f7332cd58313.png)
